theme_notes: NBA Finals 2026 (Knicks beat the Spurs in Game 1, chasing their first title since 1973) and the US-Iran escalation (Iran hit Kuwait and Bahrain with missiles, US struck Qeshm Island, House voted 215-208 to end the war), plus Russia's overnight aerial assault on Kyiv and World Cup 2026 labor protests in Mexico City.
settled: Even. Iran's at war with half the Gulf. You two sorted it out. Cherish this.
Zero debt. The Knicks are in the Finals. Both unprecedented. Write it down.
Balanced. You're the most stable two-party system in this week's news.
youOwe: Less than a World Cup souvenir scarf. More embarrassing than losing one.
Under fifty. Still more than Iran offered Kuwait in goodwill. Probably.
The Spurs went home down 1-0. You're also losing, just financially.
Nosebleed-ticket money at MSG. You're in the rafters of this relationship.
Mexico's teachers are striking for fair wages. Your partner's asking for theirs back.
The House voted 215-208 to end a war. This needs one fewer vote: yours.
World Cup upper-deck money. You've been eliminated from the moral group stage.
Ukrainian drones hit an oil depot during Putin's own economic forum. Bold timing.
You've crossed into 'we need to talk' territory. Like 'US strikes Iranian facility.'
Iran hit Kuwait and Bahrain in one night. You've owed this for a month. Equally indefensible.
Almost a grand. Congress resolved a war powers vote with more urgency.
Kuwait lost an entire airport to drones. You're losing the high ground to invoices.
The Knicks last won in 1973. Your debt has generational staying power.
Jared Kushner is developing Albania. You're developing a debt in this apartment.
The US struck a base in Iran. Consider this your equivalent incursion.
MSG Finals courtside starts at $4K. You owe more and still aren't in the room.
53 years since the Knicks won. This debt doesn't have that kind of excuse.
Russia launched a full air assault on Kyiv. Your partner launched this invoice. Same energy.
theyOwe: Under fifty owed to you. More leverage than it looks.
Pocket change. But you're the creditor. That's the whole thing.
Less than a World Cup souvenir. Still yours. The principle stands.
Game 1 of the Finals: yours. This debt: also yours. Protect both leads.
A hundred bucks. The Spurs are down 1-0. So is your partner.
Enough for Knicks playoff merch. Make them feel every dollar.
Mexico's striking teachers want fair wages. So do you. Demand them.
Ukraine hit Putin's economic forum with a drone. Hit them with this invoice.
The EU calls this a bilateral imbalance. It is.
Half an MSG nosebleed ticket. Every last drop of your patience.
Iran struck two countries in one night. You've held this longer. Breathe.
The Spurs need to win Game 2 or panic sets in. So do they about this debt.
The Knicks are 12-0 in the playoffs. Operate with that same energy. Collect.
Kuwait's airport got bombed and is already recovering. This debt has not moved.
More than Kushner's Albanian beach zoning fee. A worse investment for them.
The Knicks haven't won since 1973. This debt doesn't get that kind of patience.
MSG Finals courtside money. Demand that seat. You've earned it.
Russia, Iran, your partner — all overextended, all your problem, none of them paying.
